testcase.name: aop_context_proxy_is_accessible_because_exposeProxy_is_true

[ main] plicationEvents$DangerousStartupListener : [DANGEROUS] ContextRefreshedEvent fired! Count=1 | Context=org.springframework.context.annotation.AnnotationConfigApplicationContext@486be205 2026-04-05T22:57:30.353+05:30 INFO 537515 --- [phase1-core-test] [ main] c.t.p.day19.Day19SelfInvocationTest : Started Day19SelfInvocationTest in 2.309 seconds (process running for 3.641) === DAY 2: Bean Registration === Beans of type NotificationService registered: Bean[emailNotification] -> EMAIL: Hello World Bean[smsNotification] -> SMS: Hello World
RULE: Use @Component for YOUR classes. Use @Bean for 3rd-party classes. RULE: If two @Component beans of same type collide -> use @Primary or @Qualifier. ================================= === DAY 6: Scope Bug Demo === 2026-04-05T22:57:30.361+05:30 WARN 537515 --- [phase1-core-test] [ main] c.t.p.d.Day06Scope$BrokenOrderService : [BUG] Cart id=95682931515806 now has 1 items — shared across all users! 2026-04-05T22:57:30.362+05:30 WARN 537515 --- [phase1-core-test] [ main] c.t.p.d.Day06Scope$BrokenOrderService : [BUG] Cart id=95682931515806 now has 2 items — shared across all users! [BUG] UserB's cart has: [userA:Laptop, userB:Phone] 2026-04-05T22:57:30.363+05:30 INFO 537515 --- [phase1-core-test] [ main] c.t.p.day06.Day06Scope$ShoppingCart : [ShoppingCart] New cart created: id=95683505082851 2026-04-05T22:57:30.364+05:30 INFO 537515 --- [phase1-core-test] [ main] cope$FixedOrderServiceWithObjectProvider : [FIX-1] Fresh cart created: id=95683505082851 2026-04-05T22:57:30.365+05:30 INFO 537515 --- [phase1-core-test] [ main] c.t.p.day06.Day06Scope$ShoppingCart : [ShoppingCart] New cart created: id=95683506854634 2026-04-05T22:57:30.366+05:30 INFO 537515 --- [phase1-core-test] [ main] cope$FixedOrderServiceWithObjectProvider : [FIX-1] Fresh cart created: id=95683506854634 [FIX1] CartA: [Laptop] | CartB: [Phone] [FIX1] Same cart? false ============================= === DAY 19: Self-Invocation Trap ===
THE RULE: Never call @Transactional/@Async/@Cacheable methods via this.xxx() WHY: 'this' is the RAW object, not the Spring proxy. FIX: Extract to a separate @Component (always best). FIX: Use AopContext.currentProxy() (needs exposeProxy=true).
To see the TX names, start with a real DataSource (phase2-data module). In this phase, observe the log messages to understand the concept. ==================================== === DAY 7: Custom Domain Events === 2026-04-05T22:57:30.368+05:30 INFO 537515 --- [phase1-core-test] [ main] t.p.d.Day07ApplicationEvents$UserService : [UserService] Registering user: U-001 2026-04-05T22:57:30.369+05:30 INFO 537515 --- [phase1-core-test] [ main] p.d.Day07ApplicationEvents$AuditListener : [AUDIT LISTENER] Audit: user U-001 registered at 1775410050368 2026-04-05T22:57:30.369+05:30 INFO 537515 --- [phase1-core-test] [ main] licationEvents$EmailNotificationListener : [EMAIL LISTENER] Sending welcome email to: alice@example.com 2026-04-05T22:57:30.370+05:30 INFO 537515 --- [phase1-core-test] [ main] t.p.d.Day07ApplicationEvents$UserService : [UserService] Event published for user: U-001 2026-04-05T22:57:30.370+05:30 INFO 537515 --- [phase1-core-test] [ main] t.p.d.Day07ApplicationEvents$UserService : [UserService] Registering user: U-002 2026-04-05T22:57:30.370+05:30 INFO 537515 --- [phase1-core-test] [ main] p.d.Day07ApplicationEvents$AuditListener : [AUDIT LISTENER] Audit: user U-002 registered at 1775410050370 2026-04-05T22:57:30.371+05:30 INFO 537515 --- [phase1-core-test] [ main] licationEvents$EmailNotificationListener : [EMAIL LISTENER] Sending welcome email to: bob@example.com 2026-04-05T22:57:30.371+05:30 INFO 537515 --- [phase1-core-test] [ main] t.p.d.Day07ApplicationEvents$UserService : [UserService] Event published for user: U-002 =================================== RULE: For startup side effects, use ApplicationReadyEvent. RULE: ContextRefreshedEvent fires N times (once per context in MVC). === DAY 8: Injection Styles === [GOOD] getUser: User[42]
RULE: Constructor injection only. RULE: @RequiredArgsConstructor (Lombok) generates it for you. RULE: No @Autowired on fields. Ever. ================================ === DAY 1: BeanFactory vs ApplicationContext === [ApplicationContext] Type : AnnotationConfigApplicationContext [ApplicationContext] Total beans registered: 169 [ApplicationContext] First 5 beans: [org.springframework.context.annotation.internalConfigurationAnnotationProcessor, org.springframework.context.annotation.internalAutowiredAnnotationProcessor, org.springframework.context.annotation.internalCommonAnnotationProcessor, org.springframework.context.event.internalEventListenerProcessor, org.springframework.context.event.internalEventListenerFactory]
BeanFactory = lazy, no events, no AOP auto-proxy ApplicationContext = eager singletons + events + AOP + i18n Spring Boot gives you ApplicationContext every time. NEVER use BeanFactory in your own code — only exists inside framework internals. ================================================= 2026-04-05T22:57:30.374+05:30 INFO 537515 --- [phase1-core-test] [ main] y07ApplicationEvents$SafeStartupListener : [SAFE] ApplicationReadyEvent fired — exactly once — safe for startup logic! [DAY 19] AopContext is correctly configured. [DAY 19] IllegalStateException here is normal — we are not inside a proxied call. [DAY 19] The proxy IS available inside @Transactional / @Around methods.
testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build what is described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (/home/ilabs-laph893/.m2/repository/net/bytebuddy/byte-buddy-agent/1.15.11/byte-buddy-agent-1.15.11.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: self_invocation_runs_in_same_transaction

error.message: Cannot activate transaction synchronization - already active

testcase.error: java.lang.IllegalStateException: Cannot activate transaction synchronization - already active at org.springframework.transaction.support.TransactionSynchronizationManager.initSynchronization(TransactionSynchronizationManager.java:256) at org.springframework.transaction.support.AbstractPlatformTransactionManager.prepareSynchronization(AbstractPlatformTransactionManager.java:583) at org.springframework.transaction.support.AbstractPlatformTransactionManager.startTransaction(AbstractPlatformTransactionManager.java:538) at org.springframework.transaction.support.AbstractPlatformTransactionManager.getTransaction(AbstractPlatformTransactionManager.java:405) at org.springframework.test.context.transaction.TransactionContext.startTransaction(TransactionContext.java:103) at org.springframework.test.context.transaction.TransactionalTestExecutionListener.beforeTestMethod(TransactionalTestExecutionListener.java:248) at org.springframework.test.context.TestContextManager.beforeTestMethod(TestContextManager.java:320) at org.springframework.test.context.junit.jupiter.SpringExtension.beforeEach(SpringExtension.java:237) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596)

testcase.name: transactional_on_private_method_is_always_ignored
testcase.system-out: [DAY 19] @Transactional on private methods is SILENTLY IGNORED. [DAY 19] Why: proxy cannot override private methods (Java restriction). [DAY 19] Spring 6.0+ logs a warning when it detects this pattern. [DAY 19] FIX: Make the method public and call via a separate bean.
